About the job

Your role as an AI Developer

About the Company
Bridge Partners is a consulting firm that helps teams build practical digital products.

How you'll contribute
You will build internal AI-enabled workflow tools, automate repeatable processes,
and partner with business stakeholders to turn ambiguous needs into usable software.

Your skills and approach
- Python
- SQL
- APIs
- Careful documentation

Work Eligibility
Applicants must be authorized to work in the United States.

All roles are remote, with optional collaboration near preferred hubs.

Compensation
$90,000 - $120,000
